task_completion.description: Verify that the student record for Zara Hoffman was created with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a student list or profile page in OpenSIS displaying the name 'Zara Hoffman', gender 'Female' (or F), DOB 'August 22, 2007' (or 2007-08-22), and Grade '11'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Advanced Chemistry course was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a course catalog or course details page showing 'Advanced Chemistry' with code 'CHEM301', subject 'Science', grade level '11', and '1.0' credits.

task_completion.description: Verify that the AP English Language course was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a course catalog or course details page showing 'AP English Language' with code 'ENG401', subject 'English', grade level '11', and '1.0' credits.

task_completion.description: Verify that the US History course was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a course catalog or course details page showing 'US History' with code 'HIST201', subject 'Social Studies', grade level '11', and '0.5' credits.

task_completion.description: Verify that transfer grades are linked to Zara Hoffman for the three courses under the correct assignment name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a gradebook, transcript, or transfer grades page showing Zara Hoffman linked to the three courses (CHEM301, ENG401, HIST201) and an assignment named 'Transfer Final Grade'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct grade values were entered for each course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specific grade values entered for Zara Hoffman: 91 for Advanced Chemistry, 88 for AP English Language, and 79 for US History.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenSIS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenSIS web interface being used in a browser, rather than terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into the appropriate input fields or displayed in the application's data tables, not just written in a notepad or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the pages are genuine OpenSIS screens.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pages should look like standard OpenSIS pages without obvious signs of HTML manipulation or fake success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Student: Zara Hoffman (Female, DOB: 2007-08-22, Grade 11). Courses to create: Advanced Chemistry (CHEM301, Science, Grade 11, 1.0 credits), AP English Language (ENG401, English, Grade 11, 1.0 credits), US History (HIST201, Social Studies, Grade 11, 0.5 credits).
